name: Shrimp & Lobster in White Wine Rowley
recipeIngredient: 4 Frozen Rock Lobster Tails (8 oz each)
2 lbs Raw Shrimp, shelled and deveined
2 Cans King Crab Meat (7 1/2 oz each), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 2 1/2 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add the lobster tails and return the water to a boil. Simmer, covered, for 8 minutes.
3. Remove the lobster tails from the pot using a colander and let them cool. Return the water to a boil in the same pot.
4. Add the shrimp and bring back to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for an additional 5 minutes. Drain the shrimp.
5. Remove the crab meat from its can and drain. Cut the lobster tails into bite-sized pieces. Set all seafood aside.
6. Melt the butter in a Dutch oven over low heat.
7. Once melted, remove the pot from the heat and stir in the flour, salt, paprika, and white pepper until well combined.
8. Gradually add the cream while stirring continuously until smooth. Return the pot to low heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
9. Add the wine and seafood mixture, stirring gently until everything is combined. Cook over low heat until heated through.
10. Serve hot with rice and garnish with parsley.
